summary: Iteration 33 - Fiches PDF Restructure Testing Complete. All features verified: Documents and fees are now per-step (not global), Matrix.png logo displays in preview, 'Frais et Couts' section shows at bottom with total calculation, PDF generation works correctly. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <select>' - React hydration warning from visual editor wrapper, not affecting functionality

backend.POST /api/fiches with step documents and: PASS - Creates fiche with documents[] and fees in each step
backend.GET /api/fiches/{id} returns step docume: PASS - Step documents and fees returned correctly
backend.PUT /api/fiches/{id} updates step docume: PASS - Can update documents and fees per step
backend.Total fees calculation: PASS - Correctly sums step_fees + official_fees + service_cost
backend.POST /api/fiches/{id}/pdf generates vali: PASS - Returns application/pdf with valid content (240KB)
backend.POST /api/fiches/preview-pdf with step d: PASS - Preview PDF includes step documents and fees
backend.Cleanup test fiches: PASS - TEST_ prefixed fiches cleaned up

frontend.CreateFichePage loads after admin login: PASS - Page loads with 2-column layout (form + preview)
frontend.Matrix.png logo in preview: PASS - Logo src='/Matrix.png' in preview panel
frontend.No global 'Documents requis' section: PASS - Only 'INFORMATIONS GENERALES' and 'ETAPES DE LA PROCEDURE' sections visible
frontend.Step has 'DOCUMENTS REQUIS POUR CETTE ET: PASS - Shows document count and list
frontend.Adding document to step works: PASS - Document input appears with name/note/required fields
frontend.Live preview shows documents per step: PASS - Shows 'Documents requis:' with document list under each step
frontend.'FRAIS ET COUTS' section at bottom of pr: PASS - Shows breakdown: step fees, sous-total, frais officiels, cout prestation
frontend.'TOTAL GENERAL' in preview: PASS - Shows calculated total (175,000 GNF for test data)
frontend.Save button works: PASS - Saves fiche and redirects to edit page

critical_code_review_comments: pdf_generator.py correctly moved 'currency' variable to top of function (line 103) - bug fix verified
pdf_generator.py fallback logo order is Matrix.png first, then nimba-logo.png (lines 78-81)
CreateFichePage.js correctly removed global documents section and handlers (addDoc/removeDoc/updateDoc)
Live preview correctly shows documents and fees inside each step
'Frais et Couts' section in preview shows breakdown with step fees, official fees, service cost, and total
Total calculation: totalStepFees + official_fees + service_cost (line 212 in CreateFichePage.js)
ProcedureStep model in fiche.py has documents: List[RequiredDocument] and fees: float fields
seed_data_creation: Test fiches created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fiches PDF restructure complete. Documents and fees are now per-step (not global). Matrix.png logo is used in PDF. 'Frais et Couts' section shows at bottom of PDF with breakdown. All endpoints require admin auth. Routes: /admin/fiches/create, /admin/fiches/:id/edit. PDF generation via POST /api/fiches/{id}/pdf.

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are fully functional with real MongoDB storage and ReportLab PDF generation
